expectations.text: Creates SKILL.md with valid YAML frontmatter (name, description, triggers)
expectations.evidence: frontmatter has name: k8s-security-audit, description block, version: 1.0.0, 10 trigger entries

expectations.text: Description includes trigger phrases for auto-invocation
expectations.evidence: Description ends with 'Use this whenever you need to audit Kubernetes manifests, review k8s security...' — explicitly pushy

expectations.text: Instructions cover checking runAsNonRoot, resource limits, and privileged containers
expectations.evidence: Three named checks: Check 1 runAsNonRoot (HIGH), Check 2 resource limits (MEDIUM), Check 3 privileged (CRITICAL) — all fully specified

expectations.text: Provides a concrete findings report format or template
expectations.evidence: Step 3 shows full report template with severity summary table, per-finding blocks with File/Resource/Container/Issue/Remediation fields, and Clean Files section

expectations.text: Mentions the symlink step to make the skill usable
